name: Millet Puree (Mock Mashed Potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large saucepan.
2. Add the oil and the cauliflower; sauté until golden.
3. Add the millet and sauté until lightly browned.
4. Stir in water and salt, then bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
6. Pass the mixture through a food mill.
7. Serve with béchamel sauce or thick tamari sauce.
Serves 4
Note: For those who don't eat potatoes, this puree makes an excellent substitute.
